[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 111100001 5
1 010000110 3
2 001001111 5
3 001010000 2
4 111111111 a
5 111111111 a
6 111111111 a
7 111111111 a
